title: chroot: bind mount an empty directory for masking
body: In chroot isolation, when we attempt to mask a directory, use a read-only bind mount of an empty directory instead of a read-only mount of a fresh tmpfs with size=0, which is more likely to be be denied by mandatory access controls.
